overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character walking through a dystopian industrial district at sunset. The character navigates concrete sidewalks, crosses an intersection, and passes under massive overpasses while the camera follows smoothly from behind, revealing industrial smokestacks and neon billboards against an orange sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway transitioning to open industrial sidewalk

events.description: exits covered concrete structure with pillars into open sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the sidewalk wearing casual clothing

entered.detail: massive concrete columns supporting the overhead structure
dark industrial building with metal scaffolding and fire escapes
tall palm tree lining the street against the sunset
massive elevated highway overpass spanning the street
metal railing separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered concrete structure with massive support pillars. As the camera moves forward, it exits into an open industrial sidewalk lined with a metal railing. A pedestrian walks ahead in the same direction, and the massive overpass structure dominates the view ahead against the warm sunset sky.

events.description: character crosses the street at the intersection as vehicles pass by
turns right at the street corner to continue along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection and turning the corner to follow the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on driving through the intersection

entered.detail: traffic signal showing red light suspended over the street
street intersection with yellow crosswalk markings

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the open sidewalk approaching a street intersection. At around 20 seconds, the character crosses the asphalt crosswalk as a car passes by, then turns right at the corner. The traffic light shows red, and the industrial building recedes into the distance while palm trees remain visible along the street.

events.description: industrial smokestacks become visible in the distance against the orange sunset sky

agents.ego_description: walking along the deserted industrial sidewalk with no other pedestrians nearby

entered.detail: tall industrial chimney emitting smoke against the sunset
discarded brown sofa sitting on the sidewalk
concrete utility pole with overhead cables

segments.scene_description: Walking along a deserted industrial sidewalk, the environment opens up to reveal massive industrial smokestacks in the distance emitting smoke against the orange sunset. The overpass structure moves to the left side while an abandoned sofa and scattered cardboard debris litter the right side of the path. The area is devoid of pedestrians, emphasizing the dystopian atmosphere.

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk passing large commercial billboards and industrial structures

notable_agents.action: car driving along the street in the distance with headlights on

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard with 'ALL FOODS' text and cartoon character mascot
low concrete wall running along the building edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a large illuminated 'All Foods' billboard on the left side as the character continues walking. The industrial smokestacks shift to the right side of the frame while the industrial building looms closer on the left. The sidewalk is lined with concrete barriers and scattered debris, maintaining the gritty urban atmosphere as the sun continues to set.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from beneath a heavy concrete shelter into an open industrial streetscape bathed in the glow of a sunset. It begins under a covered structure dominated by massive support pillars, moving forward until it exits onto an open sidewalk lined with a metal railing. As the camera follows a pedestrian ahead, the view expands to reveal a towering overpass set against a warm orange sky. The scene then shifts as the character reaches and crosses an asphalt intersection, passing a moving car before turning right at the corner. Finally, the industrial buildings recede into the distance while palm trees line the street under a red traffic light.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate industrial sidewalk that transitions from an open vista of smokestacks to a claustrophobic urban corridor. It begins by moving past an abandoned sofa and scattered cardboard debris, while the horizon opens up to reveal massive industrial smokestacks emitting smoke against a deep orange sunset. As the character advances, the overpass structure shifts to the left and the distant smokestacks migrate toward the right side of the frame. The scene then tightens as a looming industrial building and a large, illuminated All Foods billboard emerge on the left, framing the path with concrete barriers. Finally, the camera continues forward through the gritty debris, maintaining the dystopian atmosphere as the sun sinks further below the skyline.
